'''''Ars Opus''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that was carrying [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droids]] to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] when it apparently broke down in the [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]] system.

==History==

The ''Ars Opus'' was discovered by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] reconnaissance flight and, following a recent warning from [[Ordnance and Supply/Legends|Ordnance and Supply]] about a shortage of [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]], the Rebels decided to mount a capture operation.

However, the carriage also lured [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] that attempted to hijack it and claim the units. A pirate force of [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] battled briefly against Rebel R-22 Spearheads from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. The Rebels were able to hold off the pirates while the crew of the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Rescue Riker]]'' boarded and captured the freighter. More R-22s from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] arrived to escort the newly captured freighter and the pirates were unable to get close enough to prevent its escape.

The Rebels later discovered that the ''Ars Opus'' and its cargo had been used as bait by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as part of a plan to capture some Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and their pilots. The R2 units had been deliberately programmed to hijack any X-wings they were used in. Three X-wings from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] fell into the trap and were hijacked during a mission.

The Rebels mounted a quick rescue mission to recover the stolen ships and their pilots before they could be delivered to the ''Invincible''. Tracking the X-wings to the ''Invincible's'' location, three Y-wings from Red Squadron disabled them, allowing shuttles to deliver new R2 units and the pilots to take control of their ships and fly them to the waiting [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''. Though two of the Y-wings entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] as soon as their targets were disabled, [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] engaged [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] fighters launched from ''Invincible'' and protected the rescue of the pilots, including his friend, [[Hamo Blastwell]]. The remaining R2 units were later wiped clean before use.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
